meta.title: Valanto – Real estate software from Switzerland
meta.description: Value, market, manage – in one tool. Built and hosted in Switzerland.

hero.h1: Value, market, manage – in one tool.
hero.lead: Valanto brings property management, professional valuations with dossier, and marketing together on a single platform. Built for brokers, valuers and specialists – hosted in Switzerland.
hero.trust: No credit card required · 1 free valuation · Swiss hosting

trust.line: Trusted by real estate professionals across Switzerland

features.h2: One tool for the entire real estate workflow
features.intro: Instead of three tools and duplicate data entry: Valanto covers the whole process – from the first valuation to finished marketing.

items.d: Manage every object centrally – including a complete dossier per property.
Create professional property valuations and export them as a clean dossier.
Set up projects, manage units and keep an eye on the sales status.
A dedicated marketing page for every object or project – no extra tool.
A dedicated access for sellers and partners – transparent and controlled.
Contacts, prospects and configuration in one place. (planned / in development)

items.text: Manage properties, create landing pages and stay on top of your new-build projects – all without switching tools.
Create standard-compliant valuations with a professional dossier. Fast, traceable, exportable.
You do both? Combine valuation and marketing on one continuous platform – with all modules.

pricing.intro: Cancel monthly. No hidden costs. Start with a free valuation.
pricing.note: All prices excl. VAT · Custom solutions for teams on request.

plans.name: SPECIALIST
features: For those who value and market

siv.text: Valanto grows out of the daily practice of property valuation and maintains an exchange with the Swiss valuers' association SIV. This keeps the platform close to the demands of real valuation work – not those of any off-the-shelf software.

points.d: Your data stays in the country.
By real estate professionals, for real estate professionals.

cta.h2: Ready to give it a try?
cta.text: Create your first valuation for free, or let us show you the platform in a personal demo.

footer.claim: Value, market, manage – in one tool.
footer.copy: © 2026 Valanto / Felsberg Consulting GmbH. All rights reserved.
